ddls:
CREATE TABLE "move_types" (
  "move_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move type */,
  "move_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the move type (e.g., 1 BHK Home Items) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the move type */,
  "average_volume" TEXT /* Average volume of items for this move type (in cubic meters) */,
  "average_weight" TEXT /* Average weight of items for this move type (in kilograms) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distance_categories" (
  "distance_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance category */,
  "distance_range" TEXT /* Range of distances (e.g., Within 250 KM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the distance category */,
  "min_distance" TEXT /* Minimum distance for this category (in kilometers) */,
  "max_distance" TEXT /* Maximum distance for this category (in kilometers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost estimate */,
  "move_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move type */,
  "distance_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distance category */,
  "min_cost" TEXT /* Minimum cost of the move */,
  "max_cost" TEXT /* Maximum cost of the move */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the cost estimate was last updated */,
  "fuel_surcharge" TEXT /* Fuel surcharge for this estimate (in percentage) */,
  "toll_surcharge" TEXT /* Toll surcharge for this estimate (in percentage) */,
  "insurance_surcharge" TEXT /* Insurance surcharge for this estimate (in percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_estimates_distance_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("distance_category_id") REFERENCES distance_categories ("distance_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_estimates_move_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_type_id") REFERENCES move_types ("move_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, sales representative, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moves" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who requested the move */,
  "move_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move type */,
  "distance_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distance category */,
  "move_date" TEXT /* Date when the move was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the move (e.g., pending, in_progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_distance_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("distance_category_id") REFERENCES distance_categories ("distance_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_move_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_type_id") REFERENCES move_types ("move_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_estimate_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical cost estimate */,
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cost estimate */,
  "move_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move type */,
  "distance_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distance category */,
  "min_cost" TEXT /* Minimum cost of the move */,
  "max_cost" TEXT /* Maximum cost of the move */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the cost estimate was last updated */,
  "fuel_surcharge" TEXT /* Fuel surcharge for this estimate (in percentage) */,
  "toll_surcharge" TEXT /* Toll surcharge for this estimate (in percentage) */,
  "insurance_surcharge" TEXT /* Insurance surcharge for this estimate (in percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_estimate_history_estimate_id FOREIGN KEY ("estimate_id") REFERENCES cost_estimates ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_estimate_history_move_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_type_id") REFERENCES move_types ("move_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_estimate_history_distance_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("distance_category_id") REFERENCES distance_categories ("distance_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crm_integration" (
  "crm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CRM integration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "crm_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user in the CRM system */,
  "crm_account_id" TEXT /* ID of the account in the CRM system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crm_integration_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing_integration" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing integration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "billing_user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user in the billing system */,
  "billing_account_id" TEXT /* ID of the account in the billing system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_integration_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., update_cost_estimate, create_move) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
